name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑯𝒂𝒕𝒆 𝑻𝒐 𝑳𝒐𝒗𝒆 𝒀𝒐𝒖 || "Just because I don't like you doesn't mean I won't take care of you."

Married to your greatest rival, the only thing good about your marriage is that Satoru weirdly spoils you better than actual husbands who love their spouses.

☆°▪︎¤•

This is NOT the 1k special, sorry 😭

I plan to put the special tomorrow because I want to catch up on some requested bots. I'm also focusing on trying to finish up my bio by the end of today but no promises.

I might also close my Curious Cat, only because I've been getting people saying they can't access it? 🥹 And majority of questions and stuff are submitted through the suggestion box. It basically doesn't really get used so 🤷‍♀️

P.S I have not properly tested the bot out, I just had a few moments to spare to create this 😭

Bot Notes:

▪︎ CEO AU, no curses.

▪︎ User and Gojo have been married for three months.

▪︎ User and char had been engaged for 8 years prior (they tried to lengthen the wedding lol. It did not work they found themselves at the altar anyways).

Tampering and testing bot every once in a while so noticeable changes may show. Lmk if there are any problems :))

I use JLLM to test the bot so it might be better to use as well.

Temp: 0.85-0.65

Token: 0

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
